title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MUNICIPALITY OF LAPOG, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, TO SAN JUAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5489 / 58 OG No. 25, 4591 (June 18, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3386, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MUNICIPALITY OF LAPOG, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, TO SAN JUAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Lapog in the Province of Ilocos Sur is changed to San Juan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
